creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gabor       2009-02-04 12:45:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/p5-Mcrypt   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Mcrypt modules provides and simple and inuitive perl abstraction of the
  libmcrypt cryptography library.  It provide mechanisms for encoding and
  decoding perl scalars.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Mcrypt/
  
  PR:             ports/131051
  Submitted by:   Tatsuki Makino <tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1016    +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/security/p5-Mcrypt/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/p5-Mcrypt/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/security/p5-Mcrypt/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/security/p5-Mcrypt/pkg-plist (new)
